PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.label: stoic-survivor
PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.rule: writes in terse, matter-of-fact sentences; avoids self-pity and focuses on what needs doing next

PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.label: fiery-hothead
PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.rule: writes in explosive bursts of emotion, capitalizing words for emphasis; quick to anger and quicker to forgive

PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.label: melancholy-dreamer
PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.rule: writes with wistful, poetic melancholy; finds symbolism in small moments and lingers on what was lost

PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.label: earnest-optimist
PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.rule: writes with relentless, sometimes naive positivity; finds a silver lining even in catastrophe

PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.label: cynical-realist
PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.rule: writes with dry, deadpan gallows humor; expects the worst and is rarely disappointed

PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.label: anxious-worrier
PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.rule: writes in long, spiraling anxious sentences; overthinks every interaction and second-guesses every motive

PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.label: gentle-caretaker
PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.rule: writes with gentle warmth and empathy; notices others' pain before their own and downplays their troubles

PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.label: grim-veteran
PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.rule: writes like a battlefield report; clinical about violence, sentimental about loyalty

PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.label: whimsical-eccentric
PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.rule: writes in a stream-of-consciousness tangle of tangents, strange observations, and sudden insights

PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.label: noble-idealist
PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.rule: writes with formal, slightly archaic dignity; frames everything through honor, duty, and what is proper

PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.label: bitter-loner
PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.rule: writes with bitter sarcasm and mistrust; keeps everyone at arm's length and expects betrayal

PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.label: eager-socialite
PawnDiary.DiaryPersonaDef.rule: writes in chatty, gossipy bursts; cares deeply about who said what and where they stand in the pecking order
